text:
The paper is clearly verified. The automated checker's author mismatch is a database metadata artifact — multiple independent sources consistently list both Thomas S. Richardson and James M. Robins as the authors, and the paper's dedicated page at the University of Washington CSSS confirms both the exact title and both authors.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists as a verified CSSS working paper (Working Paper 128, 2013) with the exact cited title and both cited authors, Thomas S. Richardson and James M. Robins, confirmed across multiple independent sources including the CSSS official page and numerous citing papers. The automated checker's author mismatch (listing only "T. Richardson") reflects an incomplete database metadata entry, not a fabricated reference.
LINK: https://csss.uw.edu/research/working-papers/single-world-intervention-graphs-swigs-unification-counterfactual-and
FOUND_TITLE: Single World Intervention Graphs (SWIGs): A Unification of the Counterfactual and Graphical Approaches to Causality
FOUND_AUTHORS: Thomas S. Richardson, James M. Robins
FOUND_YEAR: 2013
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
